title: SaaS Application
description: A SaaS application discovered and cataloged by Wing Security's SSPM platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SaaS application.

name.description: The name of the SaaS application.

category.description: The functional category of the application (e.g., Productivity, Security, DevTools).

vendor.description: The company or organization that provides the SaaS application.

riskScore.description: A numerical risk score (0-100) assigned to the application based on permissions, data access, and known vulnerabilities.

riskLevel.description: Categorical risk level for this application.

discoverySource.description: How the application was discovered (e.g., OAuth, IdP, Network).

users.description: List of user identifiers who have granted this application access.

permissions.description: OAuth scopes or permissions granted to this application.

connections.description: App-to-app connections from this application to other SaaS tools.

misconfigurations.description: Security misconfigurations identified in this application.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the most recent activity observed for this application.

status.description: Current governance status of the application.
